input:
$meta:
  kind: chart
chart:
  chartType: candlestick
  title: OHLC
series:
  - name: ACME
    data:
      - { t: "2024-01-01", o: 1, h: 2, l: 0.5, c: 1.5 }
      - { t: "2024-01-02", o: 1.5, h: 2.2, l: 1.1, c: 2.0 }
driftNote: Number representation in pass-through series data: a YAML/JSON literal with an explicit decimal point (c: 2.0) is preserved by Jackson as 2.0, while the TS codec (JS number) collapses it to 2. Affects verbatim-preserved chart data points that carry whole-valued decimals.
